home.title:
Guitar felt hard because
the path was unclear
home.lead: Follow one small lesson a day. A clear, step-by-step order — free all the way through.

teaser.title: More curricula are on the way
teaser.desc: Chord changes · Rhythm strumming · Blues licks … unlocking in order, free

home.storage: No sign-up here. Progress lives in this browser, and clearing the cache can erase it — backing it up now and then keeps it safe.
home.philosophy:
With the right order, anyone can play guitar.
That's why every lesson here stays free.

lesson.title: Today's lesson
lesson.chord_note: Head on the left · finger dots drawn from data onto the 6-string × fret grid
lesson.tab_note: In the live app, playback & tempo controls live here
lesson.complete_toast: 🎉 You just got a little better!
lesson.locked: A little more and this one opens up

donate.title: You've been following along great! 👏
donate.sub: Everything ahead is free too! Following along this far already saved you several lesson fees. If it helped, a coffee-sized cheer supports the next curriculum.
donate.close: No thanks, I'll keep learning for free
donate.thanks: You keep this fun to build. Thank you!
donate.notice: Every bit is honestly reported as income — and a transfer may show the dev's real name, just so you know 😊

dream.line: This is the dev's dream {instrument}. Just putting that out there 😄 Tapping the button below might help me more than you'd think!

nick.title: What should we call you?
nick.sub: Just pick a nickname. No sign-up, no password.

storage.title: Back up · restore progress
storage.sub: Copy the code below and you can pick up right where you left off on any device.
storage.io_placeholder: Your backup code appears here. Paste one to restore.
storage.export_done: Safely saved. You can relax now ✅
storage.import_done: Your progress is back. Welcome home!
storage.cleared_warning: Clearing browser data wipes your progress too. Still want to?

progress.title: Your progress
progress.saved_money: You've saved about {amount} in lesson fees so far
progress.keep_going: This pace looks great on you
progress.empty: Nothing here yet. Let's ease into your first lesson

nudge.enter_week_2: 8 in 10 people put the guitar down in week 1. But you made it here, {nickname} — you're already in the top 20%. Let's keep going 👀
nudge.finish_week_1: About 35% put the guitar down by week {week}. But you've made it this far, {nickname} — you're already in the top 20%.
nudge.finish_week_2: Nice work — you're doing great. Keep this pace going!
nudge.finish_week_3: How was practice? Just don't forget your metronome — it's always with you.
nudge.finish_week_4: You've made it to week {week}. A little practice each day adds up to this.
nudge.finish_week_5: Another week, complete. Your fingers are remembering a little more each time.
nudge.finish_week_6: Consistency really is the talent. Week {week}, done again today.
nudge.finish_month: A whole month. Seriously, not many people get here 👏
nudge.welcome_back: You're back, {nickname}. We saved your spot

error.generic: Something hiccuped. Want to try again in a bit?
error.not_found: Can't find that lesson. Taking you home
error.load_failed: Couldn't load that. Maybe a quick refresh?
error.save_failed: That didn't save. Let's try once more in a moment
error.offline: Looks like you're offline right now
